algo_clusters.name: The East Coast Generalists
algo_clusters.tagline: NYC-rooted investors backing fintech, consumer, and marketplace companies from seed through Series B
algo_clusters.summary: Seed, Series A-focused fintech, consumer-internet, ai investors primarily based in NYC, with shared investments in Warby Parker, Stripe, Anysphere (Cursor)

algo_clusters.name: The Public Market Crossovers
algo_clusters.tagline: Hedge fund legends making growth and late-stage bets across tech, healthcare, and industrials
algo_clusters.summary: Growth, Late Stage-focused technology, healthcare, financials investors primarily based in Other US, with shared investments in Finch Therapeutics, Covanta (Cva), Millipore (Mil)

algo_clusters.name: The Tiger Cubs
algo_clusters.tagline: NYC growth investors writing big checks into fintech, AI, and e-commerce leaders
algo_clusters.summary: Growth, Late Stage-focused fintech, ai, e-commerce investors primarily based in NYC, with shared investments in Ramp, Jd.Com, Openai

algo_clusters.name: The Operator-Investors
algo_clusters.tagline: Founders-turned-investors backing consumer, fintech, and healthcare startups outside the usual hubs
algo_clusters.summary: Seed, Series A-focused consumer-internet, fintech, healthcare investors primarily based in Other US, with shared investments in Newsvine, Azaleos, Seeq

algo_clusters.name: The Atlantic Bridge
algo_clusters.tagline: European and global investors backing fintech, enterprise, and consumer internet from Series A to growth
algo_clusters.summary: Series B, Series A-focused fintech, consumer-internet, saas investors primarily based in Europe, with shared investments in Aspora, Last.Fm, Betfair

algo_clusters.name: The Frontier Explorers
algo_clusters.tagline: LA and Asia-based investors finding opportunities in AI, logistics, and healthcare at the earliest stages
algo_clusters.summary: Seed, Series A-focused ai, saas, logistics investors primarily based in LA, with shared investments in Ninja Van, Icertis, Evidation Health

algo_clusters.name: The Platform Builders
algo_clusters.tagline: Seed-stage investors in SaaS and developer tools who bet early on category-defining platforms
algo_clusters.summary: Seed, Pre Seed-focused saas, developer-tools, fintech investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Uber, Twitter, Stripe

algo_clusters.name: The Pre-Seed Scouts
algo_clusters.tagline: Day-one investors in fintech and SaaS, often the first check in companies like DoorDash and Gusto
algo_clusters.summary: Pre Seed, Seed-focused fintech, saas, consumer-internet investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Doordash, Gusto, Flexport

algo_clusters.name: The Angel Syndicate
algo_clusters.tagline: Prolific angel investors and solo GPs in fintech, AI, and dev tools with overlapping deal flow
algo_clusters.summary: Seed, Pre Seed-focused fintech, ai, developer-tools investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Gusto, Cycognito, Coinbase

algo_clusters.name: The Growth Machines
algo_clusters.tagline: Late-stage and public market investors backing proven winners like Spotify, Airbnb, and Snowflake
algo_clusters.summary: Growth, Late Stage-focused fintech, semiconductors, ai investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Spotify, Airbnb, Snowflake

algo_clusters.name: The Sequoia Circle
algo_clusters.tagline: Top-tier growth investors in AI and fintech, co-investing in Anthropic, Robinhood, and Rippling
algo_clusters.summary: Series B, Growth-focused ai, fintech, saas investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Anthropic, Robinhood, Rippling

algo_clusters.name: The Enterprise Hunters
algo_clusters.tagline: Growth-stage specialists in enterprise software, infrastructure, and cybersecurity
algo_clusters.summary: Growth, Series B-focused enterprise-software, infrastructure, ai investors primarily based in NYC, with shared investments in Pendo, Gitlab, Kustomer

algo_clusters.name: The Infrastructure Engineers
algo_clusters.tagline: Series A investors obsessed with developer tools, data infrastructure, and cloud-native platforms
algo_clusters.summary: Series A, Seed-focused infrastructure, ai, developer-tools investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Clickhouse, Cortex, Launchdarkly

algo_clusters.name: The Marketplace Mavens
algo_clusters.tagline: Consumer and marketplace veterans who backed the early days of DoorDash, Uber, and eBay
algo_clusters.summary: Series A, Seed-focused consumer-internet, marketplaces, fintech investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Hoteltonight, Hipcamp, Doordash

algo_clusters.name: The Silicon Valley Mainstage
algo_clusters.tagline: The largest cluster of SF-based Series A investors spanning AI, fintech, and consumer
algo_clusters.summary: Series A, Seed-focused ai, fintech, consumer-internet investors primarily based in Sf Bay Area, with shared investments in Coinbase, Uber, Applied Intuition

curated_collections.name: The OGs
curated_collections.tagline: Investing since before the dot-com bubble burst. They've seen every cycle and are still writing checks.

curated_collections.name: The Original Super Angels
curated_collections.tagline: The 2005-2012 wave that proved individual investors could compete with big firms. They invented the angel-at-scale model.

curated_collections.name: The New Generation
curated_collections.tagline: Started investing in 2018 or later. The next wave of venture, shaped by crypto winters, AI summers, and a pandemic.

curated_collections.name: The Hardest of Hard Tech
curated_collections.tagline: Atoms over bits. These investors back rockets, robots, chips, and defense systems where the moat is physics, not code.

curated_collections.name: Not Afraid of Regulators
curated_collections.tagline: They invest where others fear to tread — fintech, healthcare, crypto, insurance. Regulatory complexity is a moat, not a bug.

curated_collections.name: The AI True Believers
curated_collections.tagline: Invested in AI before it was cool — and doubled down after. Their portfolios include the companies building the foundation models.

curated_collections.name: Crypto Conviction
curated_collections.tagline: HODLing through every winter. They kept backing blockchain and crypto infrastructure when everyone else ran.

curated_collections.name: The Solo GPs
curated_collections.tagline: No partnership, no committee, no BS. They write their own checks and make their own decisions — often faster than anyone else.

curated_collections.name: The Fintech Mafia
curated_collections.tagline: Deep in the financial plumbing. They backed multiple fintech unicorns and understand payments, lending, and banking infrastructure cold.

curated_collections.name: The Consumer Whisperers
curated_collections.tagline: They see consumer behavior shifts before anyone else. Portfolios full of the apps and marketplaces that changed daily life.

curated_collections.name: Pure Seed
curated_collections.tagline: Exclusively early stage. No Series B creep, no growth fund. These investors live and breathe the first check.

curated_collections.name: The Growth Capital
curated_collections.tagline: They show up when product-market fit is proven and the question is how fast to scale. Late-stage, growth, and crossover specialists.

curated_collections.name: The Unicorn Collectors
curated_collections.tagline: Five or more unicorns in a single portfolio. These investors have an uncanny ability to pick winners — or the dealflow to never miss.

curated_collections.name: The Uber Syndicate
curated_collections.tagline: They all backed Uber — the deal that defined a generation of venture returns. 21 investors in this directory had a piece.

curated_collections.name: The Stripe Believers
curated_collections.tagline: Twenty investors who saw two Irish brothers and bet on them rebuilding internet payments. Many got in early, all got it right.

curated_collections.name: The Coinbase Crew
curated_collections.tagline: They believed in crypto infrastructure when it was still considered a joke. Coinbase was their thesis made real.

curated_collections.name: The PayPal Mafia Extended Universe
curated_collections.tagline: Connected to the PayPal founding team through investments, companies, or direct lineage. The network that keeps on compounding.

curated_collections.name: The NYC Hustle
curated_collections.tagline: New York's seed and early-stage investors. Building the East Coast startup ecosystem one check at a time.

curated_collections.name: The Cyber Defenders
curated_collections.tagline: Investing in the companies that keep the internet safe. Cybersecurity specialists who understand threat landscapes and SOC budgets.

curated_collections.name: The Israel Connection
curated_collections.tagline: Investing in or from Israel's legendary startup ecosystem. Deep ties to Unit 8200 alumni, cybersecurity, and deep tech.

curated_collections.name: The Pear VC Family
curated_collections.tagline: The tight-knit team at Pear VC, one of the Bay Area's most active pre-seed and seed funds. Stanford roots, technical founders preferred.

curated_collections.name: The Benchmark Partnership
curated_collections.tagline: Equal partnership, no associates, no analysts. The most concentrated venture fund in Silicon Valley — every partner writes checks.

curated_collections.name: The Sequoia Machine
curated_collections.tagline: From Don Valentine to the AI era. Sequoia's partners have backed more iconic companies than any other firm in history.

curated_collections.name: Index Ventures
curated_collections.tagline: European roots, global ambitions. Index's partners bridge London, San Francisco, and everywhere the best founders build.

curated_collections.name: The Hedge Fund Crossovers
curated_collections.tagline: Wall Street money that crossed over to Sand Hill Road. When these investors show up, the check sizes get very large, very fast.

curated_collections.name: The Climate Capitalists
curated_collections.tagline: Betting that the energy transition is the biggest investment opportunity of the century. Clean energy, EVs, carbon capture, and climate adaptation.

curated_collections.name: The First Check Club
curated_collections.tagline: They wrote the seed check that started a unicorn — and did it more than once. The rarest skill in venture: picking winners at the earliest stage.

curated_collections.name: The Dealflow Network
curated_collections.tagline: They see the same deals and frequently co-invest. When one writes a check, the others are likely on the cap table too.

curated_collections.name: The Cloud Native Crew
curated_collections.tagline: Developer tools, data infrastructure, and cloud platforms. They back the picks and shovels that every startup runs on.

curated_collections.name: The Marketplace Specialists
curated_collections.tagline: They understand liquidity, take rates, and chicken-and-egg problems. The investors who built the playbook for two-sided marketplaces.

curated_collections.name: The Global Scouts
curated_collections.tagline: Investing from London, Singapore, Tel Aviv, and beyond. They see deals the Valley misses.
